title: lepisorus oligolepidus
intro: Lepisorus oligolepidus, also known as the Chinese lepidolepis, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lepisorus oligolepidus include the relief of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as the treatment of skin conditions like eczema and acne. Lepisorus oligolepidus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for its medicinal uses.
